# Units of Work

## Unit: todo-core

### Description
Core todo functionality — CRUD operations, UI components, and state management.

### Scope
- All components (App, TodoList, TodoItem)
- State management hook (useTodos)
- Todo type definition
- Build configuration (Vite, TypeScript)

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx` — Application bootstrap
- `src/App.tsx` — Root component

### Estimated Complexity
- **Components**: 3
- **Hooks**: 1
- **Types**: 1
- **LOC**: ~200

### Dependencies
- React, ReactDOM
- TypeScript
- Vite
